---
title: "Midterm 1"
subtitle: "Due 2025-10-08 by 5:00 pm."
author: Your name here
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
---

Before you start be sure to read through *all* of the rules and instructions in the `README.md`.

<br/>

### Data & Setup

```{r setup}
#| message: false
d = readr::read_csv("data/placeholder.csv")
```

-----

### Task 1 - Tidy the data

#### Write up



#### Code

```{r task1}

```

-----

### Task 2 - Summarize by group

#### Write up



#### Code

```{r task2}

```

-----

### Task 3 - Visualize the results

#### Write up



#### Code

```{r task3}

```

-----
